title: Aberdeen Group Intro Slides
author: Peter S. Kastner / Aberdeen Group
subject_domain: IT market research; corporate overview; abbreviated introduction
abstract: A brief 3-slide introduction to Aberdeen Group covering the firm's founding, mission, value proposition, and client engagement model. Summarizes Aberdeen's 1:1 analyst-client relationship, focus on business-user opportunities from technology-market change, and technology expertise. Abbreviated version of the full corporate overview presentation.
importance_rationale: Very short abbreviated version of corporate overview; limited unique content beyond other overview documents
relevance_rationale: Provides standalone introduction to Aberdeen for conference or prospect use
prescience_rationale: No novel forward-looking content; summary document only
